# Sprint 3.3 Equity And Accessibility

**Project:** urban-parking-optimization-system
**Sprint:** Sprint 3. Dynamic Pricing Engine
**Objective:** Develop a dynamic pricing engine to optimize revenue and availability without triggering public backlash or violating equity mandates.

## Description
Develop equity and accessibility rules, including low-income zone caps, ADA-designated spot exemptions, and charity event exemptions.

## Deliverable
Equity and accessibility rules document
